f2 :

    circleAverage (fun a => circleAverage (fun x => log ‖f x - a‖) 0 r + logCounting f ⊤ r) 0 1
⊢ CircleIntegrable (fun a => logCounting f (↑a) r) 0 1

-- Prove the circle integrability
    -- This follows from the fact that the integral is finite
